title: tephrosia parvifolia
intro: Tephrosia parvifolia, also known as Small-Leaf Tephrosia or Small-Leaf Hoary Pea, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia parvifolia include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties.
